query: query PRODUCT_TYPE_FILTER_PRODUCTS($productTypeId: Int!, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $filters: [FilterInput!]) { productType(id: $productTypeId) { filterProducts(offset: $offset, limit: $limit, filters: $filters) { products { results { product { name productId imageUrl } offer { price { amountInclusive } insteadOfPrice { price { amountInclusive } } } } } } } }
